Estado agora: ainda nรฃo terminou. em relaรงรฃo ao tiktok no simรฃo sina, manda esta informaรงรฃo: How the Sandbox Posting Works:No Review Needed: You can instantly enable the Content Posting API in the sandbox to test direct publishing and draft uploads.Test Accounts: You will need to add specific TikTok user accounts as "Target Users" so they can authorize your app for testing. Sandbox features are restricted exclusively to these authorized test accounts.API Restrictions: Sandbox mode requires you to strictly upload videos via the API (you must specify the file or a public URL). The posting API currently only supports video formats (no standard photo-only carousels or text posts).For a walkthrough of how to set up your Developer App, enable the sandbox, and generate the proper permissions to test your first post: 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_XgsVpggsSY&t=20s
